title: CREATIVE GUNS
description:
⭐ Gun Mod (Forge)
The mod adds fast-paced Battle Royale-style combat to Minecraft, combining elements from Free Fire and PUBG.
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/880e989dee7b0acfa14f8442d33ddb041e7b9a4c.png)
![Ingame Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d053b23652df6f1ffa4355d61b05b3d10984c830.jpeg)
⭐ Gun Mod (Forge)
The Best Gum Mod Pack for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge strikes a perfect balance between performance and fun gameplay. It is designed especially for low-end PCs to make sure that the game runs smoothly without any lag. Major FPS boost mods such as BadOptimizations, Dynamic FPS, and Smooth Boot bring down rendering and loading time considerably. Moreover, AppleSkin and Cloth Config allow for easier gaming and navigation in general.

With this mod pack comes a whole new lot of content, which includes blocks, items, and utility mods that enhance the gameplay in most aspects. The Connector mod supports multiplayer gameplay seamlessly with your friends. Embeddium reduces small frame lags, which occur on low-end PCs.

All mod configurations are fully customizable, so you can adjust graphics, entity details, and render distance according to your needs. It happens to be lightweight as well, so it will run smoothly even on PCs that have lower RAM. Overall, this is a fun, stable, and highly effective FPS-boosted mod pack perfect for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge players.
